title: Senior Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Rustomjee Group Holdings Services:
Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group Holdings Services!
